message: Performance goal created with evaluator contract

evidence: Implemented SQLiteGraphStore export, project-scoped SQLite rows, transactional file-row replacement, persisted skipped metadata, replacement deletion, project isolation tests; evaluator passed: bun run check && bun run test && bun run build.
